pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk through the house and it feels like i'm just a ghost wandering around. there's no point to any of it, honestly. i don't even recognize myself without him. everything is just... empty.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of deep space cosmics or whatever and it just hit me... like, in a billion years everything is just gonna be gone. every single thing we ever did, every person that ever lived, it's all just a temporary glitch in a vacuum that doesn't even care. it feels so stupid to even try anymore. why bother with anything if the end result is just nothingness?

pool.baseline: The candle flickers low, much like the light in my soul. He is gone... the betrayal cuts deeper than any blade ever could. There is nothing left for me in this cold, grey world but the memory of what was stolen. I feel as though I am merely a ghost haunting my own life, waiting for the darkness to finally claim what is rightfully hers.

pool.baseline: honestly i was just sitting here looking out the window and it hit me how little it would actually matter if i just... wasn't here anymore. like i'm halfway across the world and i feel like a ghost. if i just disappeared tomorrow, i don't think anyone would even notice for weeks. it's weirdly peaceful thinking about how much of a zero sum game everything is.
